_meta.description: HAR-grounded evidence for re-closing an already-completed visit in admin mode. Distinct from first-time completion (PUT/PATCH field-app/visits/{id}/shift-complete/).

sources.note: Admin re-close on an already-worked visit. Chrome HAR captured a large postData body (category-reset echo); SAS skill docs and the Stage 4 testMode protocol use empty body — server accepts empty POST and returns the same success message.

sources.payload: empty body when finishing after photo/admin mutations on a completed visit

notThisEndpoint.sourceRef: HAR entry #435 in har-evidence-27000510.json — first-time visit completion in the normal 39-call spine, NOT re-close of an already-completed visit

executorCall.sourceRef: HAR 486_2.har / 682_2.har — POST /api/v1/field-app/visits/{id}/recomplete/ → 200 {message:"Visit completed successfully."}; empty body per sas-si-to-prod-photo-recovery skill (not PUT shift-complete #435)
